response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Full Stack Engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and various backend technologies including Java and Kotlin. His roles at re:cinq and Optilyz highlight his ability to work across the full stack, integrate AI-agent infrastructure, and optimize performance in production environments. His educational background and open-source contributions further validate his technical depth and collaborative skills.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack requirements
Proven experience in backend and frontend development across multiple industries, including AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq) and real-time systems (Dunnhumby media)
Strong open-source contributions and educational background (Computer Science degree), demonstrating a commitment to continuous learning and knowledge sharing
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, which is a primary requirement for this role
No explicit mention of Vitest, though Jest is referenced; testing framework expertise is critical for this role
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) is implied but not explicitly detailed in the resume

key_factors.factor: Full stack depth in primary technologies
